{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Underground Chamber Number Three
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Underground Chamber Number Three]] is accessed via a copper door and script.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c11">''Blackflame'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
